summary: Iteration 54: Platform migration + Superadmin impersonation feature. Backend: 8/8 pytest tests passed (move-to-platform idempotency, platform institution PRO+ system activator, /auth/me points to Platform, DELETE institution error message changed away from 'vlastní instituci', impersonate 404/403-self, full start→use→stop cycle with JWT claim inspection, superadmin endpoint blocked during impersonation, audit log records start+end, stop w/o impersonation returns 400 Czech). Frontend: Sidebar correctly shows 'Budeživo Platform / Demo Admin / Správce' at bottom after migration; institutions list in /admin/superadmin correctly lists 'Budeživo Platform' (PRO+, system). Impersonation UI (users table → Impersonovat → banner → stop) could NOT be exercised because clicking an institution row in the Instituce list did not open its detail panel from my automated scripts — needs investigation of row click handler / missing data-testid on row.

ui_bugs.issue: Row click (on Test Muzeum text/parent) did not open the institution detail panel from Playwright — URL stayed on /admin/superadmin and data-testid='toggle-users-panel' was not mounted. Needs a stable data-testid on each row (e.g. institution-row-{id}) so the impersonation UI path is testable.

action_items: Add data-testid='institution-row-{id}' (or similar) to each row in SuperadminPage Instituce list so automated tests can open the detail panel reliably — current click on text node does not trigger the onClick handler attached higher up.
(Nice-to-have) Expose a quick 'Otevřít detail' button with testid in each row for keyboard + a11y + testability.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/superadmin/setup/move-to-platform is idempotent — second call returns platform_created_now=false, moved_users=[] while preserving platform_institution_id.
VERIFIED: Budeživo Platform institution exists with plan=pro_plus, plan_activated_by='system'.
VERIFIED: Superadmin's /auth/me now reports institution_id of Budeživo Platform (c18a10b9-...); sidebar bottom in AdminLayout correctly displays 'Budeživo Platform' (screenshot captured).

VERIFIED: DELETE /api/superadmin/institutions/{test_muzeum_id} with wrong confirmation_name no longer returns 'Nelze smazat vlastní instituci' — now returns a name-mismatch error. (We did NOT actually delete Test Muzeum as instructed.)

VERIFIED: POST /impersonate/start/{user_id} — returns token, target_email, expires_in_minutes=30; JWT claims contain user_id=target, impersonated_by_email=demo@budezivo.cz, impersonated_by_user_id; exp-iat ≈ 1800s (30 min), not the default 15.
VERIFIED: Guard blocks impersonating superadmins (403 'Nelze impersonovat jiného superadmina') and non-existent users (404 'Uživatel nenalezen').
VERIFIED: /auth/me during impersonation returns impersonation={active:true, original_email:'demo@budezivo.cz', original_user_id:...} and user identity is the target email.

VERIFIED: GET /api/superadmin/institutions during impersonation returns 403 with Czech message containing 'impersonac' — require_superadmin correctly blocks even though impersonated_by_email is in SUPERADMIN_EMAILS.
VERIFIED: POST /impersonate/stop returns fresh token + restored_email=demo@budezivo.cz; restored token works on superadmin endpoints again; /auth/me shows impersonation.active=false.
VERIFIED: Audit log GET /api/superadmin/audit-log contains both impersonation_start (details.target_email, target_role, reason, expires_in_minutes=30) and impersonation_end entries.
VERIFIED: POST /impersonate/stop without impersonation token returns 400 'Žádná aktivní impersonace'.
VERIFIED (route collision): Both /impersonate/start/{user_id} and /impersonate/stop resolve correctly — stop works using a non-UUID path so no collision occurred in practice.

success_rate.frontend: Partial — sidebar & institutions list verified visually; impersonation banner/button UI path could not be reached via automation (row click not wired to a stable testid)

seed_data_creation: None created (used existing platform institution and target user per brief). Did NOT delete Test Muzeum.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend feature is rock-solid via /app/backend/tests/test_impersonation_and_platform.py — run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL set. The institutions list rows in SuperadminPage don't expose a stable clickable testid — to E2E-test the impersonation banner in the UI, add data-testid='institution-row-{id}' to each row in /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/SuperadminPage.js, then the follow-up flow (toggle-users-panel → impersonate-btn-{user_id} → impersonation-banner → stop-impersonation-btn) is already correctly labeled and should be automatable. The impersonation start frontend uses window.prompt() for reason — stub in Playwright via page.evaluate("window.prompt=()=>'...';window.confirm=()=>true") before clicking the button.
